name: University of Uyo
bio: A premier federal institution committed to academic excellence, innovation, and technological advancement in the Niger Delta region.

departments.name: Computer Science
departments.bio: A department dedicated to artificial intelligence, software engineering, and computational theory. Connecting students to global tech challenges.

departments.name: Mathematics
departments.bio: Focused on pure and applied mathematical research, cryptography, and quantitative analysis.

departments.name: Mechanical Engineering
departments.bio: Centered on thermodynamic systems, robotics, and structural design.

name: Covenant University
bio: A leading private Christian institution in Nigeria driven by human development, enterprise development, and leadership education.

departments.name: Computer Science
departments.bio: One of the leading computing departments in Nigeria, focused on software development, cloud computing, and cyber security.

departments.name: Information and Communication Technology
departments.bio: Centered on network infrastructure, telecommunications, and digital systems.

departments.name: Business Management
departments.bio: Shaping future corporate leaders through rigorous enterprise strategy and entrepreneurial training.

name: University of Nigeria, Nsukka
bio: A historic federal university renowned for restoring the dignity of man through intensive research, engineering excellence, and clinical training.

departments.name: Electronic Engineering
departments.bio: A historic engineering hub pioneering research in embedded systems, power systems, and signal processing.

departments.name: Computer Science
departments.bio: Driving academic excellence through database systems, web technologies, and computational science.

departments.name: Medicine & Surgery
departments.bio: Educating world-class healthcare professionals with state-of-the-art clinical training.

name: Bells University of Technology
bio: Nigeria's premier private university of technology, fostering technological development and specialized engineering disciplines.

departments.name: Biomedical Engineering
departments.bio: Intersecting biology, medicine, and engineering to design healthcare instrumentation and prosthetics.

departments.name: Computer Engineering
departments.bio: Focused on hardware-software co-design, computer networks, and microprocessors.

departments.name: Mechatronics Engineering
departments.bio: Combining mechanical, electrical, and control systems for industrial automation.
